title: salix × coesteri
intro: Salix × coesteri is a hybrid willow plant, derived from the cross between Salix purpurea and Salix alba, known for its distinctive growth and medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of Salix × coesteri contain salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which has been used to treat pain, reduce inflammation, and lower fever. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, rheumatism, and menstrual cramps, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. Salix × coesteri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
